title: ATG12's Overlay
description:
This project includes the best texture pack that can work in any gamemode. You will not need a second pack for anything..  
It includes custom sword models, bucket models, smaller utils and much more...
body:
This pack can help you in any gamemode:
Features:

- Low fire
- Side shield
- Blue cobwebs
- Better Sword (Reducing the sword a little so it doesn't take over the whole screen)
- Smaller Utils (Food, Wind Charges etc.)
- Buckets have better viewmodels
- No Food Eating Particles
- Unobstructive Particles
- No Explosion Particles
- Better textures of potions
- Ore Borders
- Cleaner GUI (Hotbar, inventory etc.)
- Density and Breach maces have custom textures (Need Variants CIT Mod)
- No Explosion sounds
- Cleaner Obsidian
- Bow and Crossbow charging animations
- Smaller In-hand totem and smaller pop animation
- Cleaner Glint 


**Credits for some of the textures:**
• Sharpness 500k Texture pack
• JokingPvP Overlay


Creator's Discord Username: realatg12_
